overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European-style village. The character moves from a waterfront path up stone stairs, through narrow timber-framed alleys, and finally into a bustling town square with market activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path beside stone harbor wall

events.description: approaching stone staircase, preparing to ascend from waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along grassy waterfront path with swords on back

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall running along the water's edge
calm waterway with wooden docks and moored boats
rustic wooden piers extending into the water
cluster of medieval houses with straw roofs across the water
wide stone stairs leading up to upper level of village

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a grassy waterfront path with a stone harbor wall on the left and a calm canal with wooden docks on the right. The path leads toward a stone staircase in the distance, with thatched-roof houses visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase between high retaining walls

events.description: beginning ascent of wide stone staircase
reaching top of stairs, transitioning into narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs between high walls, approaching upper village level

notable_agents.action: villager standing at top of stairs near wooden structure

entered.detail: wide worn stone steps with grass growing between cracks
tall stone wall supporting the upper level
tall stone wall with wooden crates stacked against it
stacked cargo containers and sacks near the wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by high retaining walls. Wooden crates and barrels are stacked against the right wall. At the top, the scene transitions into a narrow cobblestone alley with timber-framed buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between timber-framed houses

events.description: passing outdoor forge with visible fire and blacksmith equipment on left

agents.ego_description: navigating narrow alley, weaving between villagers and obstacles

notable_agents.action: woman in brown dress walking past carrying a basket
man in red tunic leaning against timber wall

entered.detail: medieval half-timbered houses with plaster and exposed beams
wooden structures with overhanging upper floors
arched stone passage leading to town square
blacksmith area with glowing fire and tools

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow cobblestone alley lined with timber-framed houses. Various villagers walk by or stand along the walls. An outdoor forge with a visible fire sits to the left, and a stone archway at the end of the alley leads toward the town square.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with market stalls and church

events.description: passing through stone archway into open town square
entering busier market area with merchant stalls and increased pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: walking through archway into bustling square, observing market vendors and townsfolk

notable_agents.action: merchant arranging goods on wooden table
villager in red tunic walking toward archway

entered.detail: wooden tables and stalls displaying goods for sale
large ornate building with arched entrance and red roof
open cobblestone plaza with scattered benches and posts

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the stone archway into a sunlit town square. The space opens up to reveal market stalls on the right, a large gothic church building ahead, and numerous villagers walking about. The atmosphere shifts from the quiet alley to a bustling marketplace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet waterfront path that gradually opens into a bustling, sunlit town square. It begins with Geralt walking along a grassy path between a stone harbor wall and a calm canal, moving steadily toward a distant stone staircase. As he ascends the wide stairs past stacked crates and barrels, the environment shifts into a narrow cobblestone alley lined with timber-framed houses and the glow of an outdoor forge. The camera then follows him through a stone archway, where the confined space suddenly expands into a wide marketplace. Finally, the scene opens up to reveal a large gothic church and various market stalls filled with villagers under a bright, open sky.
